title: The philosophy of Ollama Launch
excerpt: The simplest way to actually put models to use

title: Yet another generalist
excerpt: I, myself, am a generalist. And I think I always have been. I’ve never been satisfied with doing the same thing for very long. I’ve also enjoyed coming up with fun ways of solving problems and don’t care as much for the tools I’m using.

title: Building Reliable AI Agents
excerpt: I got interested in agents around September 2023 and started by prototyping with gpt-3.5 and gpt-4. We’ve come a long way since then, but the fundamentals remain the same. Approaching building these from first principles – similar to how software engineering often needs to be approached – is the best way to build agents which work well.

title: Sampling and structured outputs in LLMs
excerpt: Sampling is the process of selecting a token from the model’s vocabulary based on the probability distribution.
